description: Minimal triad-aligned operator family for SoftKitty. Identical in structure to RTT operators but with softened terminology for accessibility.

envelope_sync.notes: Soft equivalent of triadic envelope alignment.

region_stabilizer.invariant: All time layers remain mutually consistent
region_stabilizer.notes: Soft equivalent of RTT stability operator.

steps: Use envelope_sync to align with T3.
Blend continuity_field and drift_field using field_blend.
example_usage.expected_outcome: A stable triadic region using SoftKitty's friendly operator family.
